hooks.command: file=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.rs$'; then cd /c/Users/PavloKoval1/IdeaProjects/movie-graph/src-tauri && cargo check 2>&1 | head -30; fi

file=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|svelte)$'; then cd /c/Users/PavloKoval1/IdeaProjects/movie-graph && npm run check 2>&1 | tail -10; fi

PostToolUse:Edit(CLAUDE.md).command:
